name: Disney® Premier Visa® Card

welcome_offer.description: $200 Disney Gift Card + $100 statement credit = $400 total value after $1,000 spending in first 3 months. $49 annual fee then applies.

earning_rates.category: Disneyland, Disney World, Disney Cruise Line
earning_rates.notes: 2% back at Disneyland, Disney World, and Disney Cruise Line
1% back at Disney Store and select Disney purchases

annual_credits.name: Theme Park Ticket Credit
annual_credits.description: $100 statement credit after spending $200+ per anniversary year on U.S. Disney Theme Park tickets

annual_credits.name: Streaming Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $120 annual credit on Disney+, Hulu, and ESPN+ (enrollment required)

other_benefits.name: Disney Character Photo
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Disney Character Photo at Disney Parks for cardmember

other_benefits.name: Disney Vacation Financing
other_benefits.description: Special financing on Disney vacation packages

other_benefits.name: Shoprunner
other_benefits.description: Free 2-day shipping at hundreds of merchants with ShopRunner

notes: $49 AF is offset by up to $220 in annual credits ($100 theme park ticket + $120 streaming). Net value is positive for Disney regulars. $200 gift card + $100 credit welcome offer makes first year very valuable. Great companion for Disney vacation planners.
